title: NeoFoxPort
description: Add a NeoForge Style little fox animation to the Fabric startup screen.
body:
# NeoFoxPort🦊
<details><summary>English</summary>

This description was translated using DeepL.

Add a NeoForge Style fox animation to the Fabric startup screen.

Important: The fox animation textures used in this mod are copyrighted by **NeoForge** and **MoJang**.
</details>

<details><summary>中文</summary>

在 Fabric 启动屏幕上添加 NeoForge 风格的狐狸动画。

重要：本模组中使用的狐狸动画纹理版权归 **NeoForge** 和 **MoJang** 所有。
</details>
